allow: Bash(git remote -v 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; gh auth status 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml .gitignore index.html package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts src/ tests/ planning/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 1: tactical combat prototype with hex grid, ECS, and Babylon.js

Battle Brothers-inspired mobile browser game foundation:
- Hex grid with pathfinding, line of sight, and field of view
- Entity Component System with 13 component types
- Turn-based combat with melee attacks, damage/armor resolution
- Simple enemy AI \(move toward and attack nearest\)
- Babylon.js rendering: hex tiles, unit discs, movement/attack overlays
- Touch input: tap to select, pan, pinch-zoom
- Babylon.GUI: action bar, turn order bar, unit info panel
- 46 unit tests for hex math, pathfinding, LoS, and combat
- GitHub Pages deployment via Actions workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git status)

Bash(git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add workflow_dispatch trigger to deploy workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/rendering/UnitRenderer.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix unit visibility: use emissive colors and fix selection ring rotation

Units were invisible because diffuse-only materials weren't lit properly
by the hemispheric light in top-down view. Switched to emissive colors
so units self-illuminate. Fixed torus selection ring rotation \(was vertical,
now flat on XZ plane\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/input/TouchManager.ts src/rendering/OverlayRenderer.ts src/scenes/DemoBattle.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix hex picking on mobile, add movement/attack overlays

- Replace scene.pick with math-based coordinate conversion for reliable
  mobile hex picking \(orthographic camera → world XZ → hex coords\)
- Show blue overlay on reachable hexes when Move is pressed
- Show red overlay on attackable adjacent enemies when Attack is pressed
- Overlay materials use emissive colors for visibility
- Tapping outside valid range cancels back to action selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/combat/CombatManager.ts src/ui/ActionBar.ts src/scenes/DemoBattle.ts src/input/TouchManager.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Streamline UX: tap-to-move, tap-to-attack, undo, fix pan

- Auto-show movement range \(blue\) and attackable enemies \(red\) when a
  unit's turn starts — no need to press Move/Attack buttons
- Tap a blue hex to move, tap a red hex to attack directly
- After moving, can undo \(reverts position\) or tap adjacent enemy to attack
- Action bar simplified to Undo / Wait / End Turn
- Fix pan: Z direction was inverted, speed was wrong. Now uses exact
  pixel-to-world conversion for 1:1 finger tracking
- Increase tap threshold to 300ms/15px for mobile reliability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/rendering/CameraController.ts src/rendering/SceneManager.ts src/input/TouchManager.ts src/scenes/DemoBattle.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix camera rotation drift, pan direction, and hex trails

- CameraController: use fixed rotation \(PI/2 pitch\) instead of setTarget\(\)
  to avoid gimbal lock that caused pan direction to rotate over time
- Pan: remove setTarget\(\) calls from pan/centerOn — rotation stays fixed
- TouchManager: fix Z-axis formulas for screen-up = world +Z mapping
- SceneManager: re-enable autoClear to prevent hex trails when panning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/ui/ActionBar.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix action bar visibility on mobile

- Add semi-transparent background container for button visibility
- Increase container height \(110px\) to clear iOS home indicator/safe area
- Buttons aligned to top of container with padding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/input/TouchManager.ts src/scenes/DemoBattle.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix desktop click: switch from mouse to pointer events, add logging

Babylon.js calls preventDefault\(\) on its pointer handlers which
suppresses subsequent mouse events. Switched to pointer events
\(pointerdown/up/move\) which coexist with Babylon's own handlers.
Touch pointers are skipped since touch events handle mobile input.

Added console.log at key points for diagnosing tap/click flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&122)

Bash(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && git add src/input/TouchManager.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix mobile GUI buttons: stop suppressing pointer events

Removing preventDefault\(\) from touchstart allows Babylon.js GUI to
receive pointer events for button taps. CSS touch-action:none already
prevents browser default gestures, so preventDefault was redundant
and was blocking the GUI from working.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && git add src/ui/ActionBar.ts src/scenes/DemoBattle.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Simplify ActionBar, add diagnostic logging

Removed Rectangle container \(possible rgba parsing issue on mobile\).
Back to plain StackPanel with 40px bottom padding to clear safe area.
Added console.log throughout ActionBar and DemoBattle for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/ui/UIManager.ts src/ui/ActionBar.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix invisible GUI on mobile: add idealHeight for DPI scaling

The AdvancedDynamicTexture was using the raw canvas resolution \(which is
CSS × devicePixelRatio with adaptToDeviceRatio:true\). On retina mobile
screens a "60px" control was tiny relative to a 2500+ pixel texture.

- Set idealHeight=844 on the GUI texture so controls scale consistently
- Wrap ActionBar buttons in a Rectangle with visible background
- Give the panel explicit width so it doesn't collapse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add CLAUDE.md with project context for development sessions

Covers build/deploy commands, architecture gotchas \(camera gimbal lock,
emissive materials, DPI scaling, touch event handling\), project structure,
and current status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
